mapper.sql: SELECT testdata_id, testdata_no, project_id, title, target_table, generate_count, output_format, rule_coordinate, rule_time_series, rule_sensor_range, rule_include_abnormal, generated_data, write_target, write_mode, ai_generated, ai_generated_at, status, author_user_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM tb_testdata WHERE del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: SELECT MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(testdata_no, '-', -1) AS UNSIGNED)) FROM tb_testdata WHERE testdata_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_testdata
testdata_no, project_id, title, target_table, generate_count, output_format, rule_coordinate, rule_time_series, rule_sensor_range, rule_include_abnormal, ai_generated, status, author_user_id, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag
#{testdataNo}, #{projectId}, #{title}, #{targetTable}, #{generateCount}, #{outputFormat}, #{ruleCoordinate}, #{ruleTimeSeries}, #{ruleSensorRange}, #{ruleIncludeAbnormal}, #{aiGenerated}, #{status}, #{authorUserId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, '0'
